---
title: "A rose for little king"
description: |
  <br>This is a home for my English writing practice<br>
  Welcome!
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: cloud
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 3
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image]
  image-align: right
comments: false
citation: false
toc: false
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

---
